title: crepis runcinata subsp. barberi
intro: Crepis runcinata subsp. barberi is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepis runcinata subsp. barberi are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea or tincture, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
